headline: If You Invested $1000 in Arista Networks a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.

headline: Arista Expands $105b AI Networking Opportunity And Raises 2026 Outlook
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) has outlined a total addressable market of $105b for its business. The company has doubled its 2026 AI networking revenue outlook. Management highlighted new AI networking solutions at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. Arista Networks focuses on cloud networking equipment and software, serving large data centers and high performance computing environments. The fresh AI networking update comes as demand for infrastructure that can support...
